---
title: "PR 2: Screenshots of the solutions"
subtitle: "Security in Computer Networks"
author: "Alejandro Pérez Bueno"
date: "today"
date-format: "MMM DD, YYYY"
toc: true
toc-title: "Table of Contents"
linkcolor: "blue"
documentclass: report
link-citations: true
link-bibliography: true
format:
  gfm: default
  pdf:
    linestretch: 1.25
    geometry:
      - top=30mm
      - left=20mm
      - heightrounded
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhead[C]{UOC}
          \fancyhead[R]{aperez-b@uoc.edu}
          \fancyfoot{}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
---

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::{.callout-note}

Below are screenshots demonstrating the command results for tasks requiring them.

:::

## Task 2

![Task 2 commands](./img/task2.png)


## Task 4

![Task 4 commands](img/task4.png)

## Task 7

![Task 7 commands](img/task7.png)

## Task 8

![Task 8 commands](img/task8.png)

## Task 9

![Task 9 commands](img/task9.png)

## Task 11

![Task 11 commands](img/task11.png)

## Task 13

![Task 13 commands](img/task13.png)
